title: Talking Tables 4 Pack Italian Spiral Twisted Dinner Candles Ideal for Dining or Gifts Beautiful Purple and Pink Premium Eco-Friendly Candle Gift Set 25cm
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: OCCASION - Perfect for romantic dinners or festive table settings, these spiral candles add a stylish flair to any event or decor.
QUALITY- Our products are made to the highest quality standard and are sold in many premium high street shops in the UK and internationally.
Size & Quantity & Material - Includes 4 x 25cm candles made from premium eco-friendly wax in purple and pink hues.
Eco Friendly - Crafted sustainably, our candles are BCORP certified, ensuring they are kind to the planet while being beautiful.
BRITISH BRAND: Talking Tables has become the go-to brand for innovative, sustainable, and design-led products that add fun and style to every occasion.
